entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 25
entries.excerpt: To the end, a psalm of David himself. Christ speaks, but in the person of the Church: for what is said has reference rather to the Christian People turned unto God. Unto You, O Lord, have I lift up my soul Psalm 24:1: with spiritual longing have I lift up the soul, that was trodden down on the earth with carnal longings. O my God, in You I trust, I shall not be ashamed Psalm 24:2. O my God, from trusting in myself I was brought even to this weakness of the flesh; and I who on abandoning God wished to be as God, fearing death from the smallest insect, was in derision ashamed for my pride; now,…
